ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Vincent Yu, Esq., for Maryann Torralba, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel reports that a draft of a petition for final distribution and is looking to obtain waivers of accounting.

At conclusion of discussion, the subject matter is continued to Apr-09-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a petition, forthwith.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom: Vincent Yu, Esq. for Maryann Torralba (Administrator).

Mr. Yu stated that the petition was submitted for filing, that it was rejected this morning for a minor mistake in the caption, that the caption was corrected, that it was submitted again for filing at 9:05 a.m. this morning, and that he realizes that the time of his filing this morning did not provide the Court enough time to take today's status off calendar.

At the conclusion of Mr. Yu's comments, the status on close of estate is continued to February 15, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it is expecting this status to go off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Continued To Feb-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Vincent Yu, Esq. for MaryAnn Torralba (Administrator).

Mr. Yu stated that the matter in Contra Costa County settled, that there is a new hearing date of 1/25/23, that there has been a service issue due to those with bad addresses, that there is some new information, that an inventory and appraisal was filed back in October, that potentially there are other accounts, that they are having trouble obtaining the information, and that there may be a Macy's pension due to the decedent. Mr. Yu also stated that his client was sent the filing a few days before Christmas but hasn't returned it yet, that he will forward another copy to his client, and that he is requesting an additional 90-day continuance.

The status on close of the estate is continued to February 1, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court stated that Mr. Yu is to have either a petition for final distribution or a petition to approve further report on status of administration on file before February 1, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Saephon. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Continued To Jan-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu, via Zoom, for Maryann Torralba, Personal Representative.

Mr. Yu acknowledges that the Inventory and Appraisal (I&A) that had been submitted for e-filing should have been conventionally files and advises that the I&A should be filed later today. Mr. Yu reports that the related litigation matter over Decedent's Trust in Contra Costa County has settled and the Contra Costa Court has set a hearing for approval for Nov-21-2022 and requests a continuance of sixty (60) days. Mr. Yu also reports of a partial I&A that is with the probate referee for appraisal of several additional bank accounts.

After additional discussion, the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jan-04-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-14-2022 Continued To Oct-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu, via Zoom, for Maryann Torralba, Personal Representative.

Mr. Yu reports of delays caused by a related trust matter which is currently litigating in Contra Costa County and of working with financial institutions to confirm beneficiaries. Mr. Yu requests a continuance of thirty (30) days to file an inventory and appraisal and a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

The matter is continued to Oct-26-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Sep-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello, via ZOOM, for Maryann Torralba, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

The court at the outset queries counsel regarding whether the search for heirs in this matter has been adequate. Counsel reports that discussions with friends, family and his longtime physician have established that the decedent had no family and that the search for heirs via Heirsearch was a broad search that confirmed the previously mentioned discussions. Counsel then reports that it has been three (3) years since the decedent died and that no potential heirs have presented themselves. Finally, counsel reports that the lost will being offered into probate is a pour-over will which names the revocable trust as the beneficiary and that the trust remains in effect.

The Petition for Probate of Lost Will, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Andam. Not reported.
